TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tayal_no_'aol, title = Tayal_no_'aol, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tayal_no_'aol} }

S.FORM: == Tayal no 'aol i Taywan == Samaan^en no tamaw ko 'aol amala saka 'orip ? Masamaanay ko pinanam no tamdaw to tayal to 'aol ? Ano 'arawen ko likisi no Taywan a tamaw a matayal pakayra toya 'aol hananay i, alatek pakaalaay to topinapina a mihecaan, o 'aol to 'orip no tamdaw haw i, caay pakaliyas to kalo'aol hananay, ano do'edoen no mita ko fana' no mikingkiway , ma'edeng sepat ko ka ralaylay nira. Sakacecay : I'ayaw no 1946 mihcaan, o pipasifana' to ninanamay to tayal to 'aol. Sakatosa : naitini i 1947~1969 a mihcaan, ma'edeng to pakano kamay a misanga' to kalomaanmaan to ralodisan no 'aol. Sakatolo : naitini i 1970~1986 mihcaan, kalokikay to ko sapisanga' to kalomaanmaan no tamdaw to 'aol. Sakasepat : naitini i ikol no 1987 a mihcaan, tangasasa imatini caayto pakaliyas to 'aol a ma 'orip ko tamdaw. Pasifana' to dafong no 'aol. Omaan ko misangaan no tamdaw ato icowaay ko tamdaw a misatapang ato cimako mipasifana'ay to tamdaw to tayal no kalo'aol, onian haw i, o haharatengen no mita, ano solinga'en a somowal i, o 'aol hananay, adi:hay ko kanga'ayan nira a misanga' to kalomaanmaan to saka 'orip no tamdaw, ano o 'arapi to, ano o pongki to, ano o pa^dangan to, ano o hatapes to ‚Ä¶ to kalomaanmaan i, saheto saan o sakanga'ay no tamdaw a ma'orip, itini i kadipongan ho a misatipang, ato itini i Cusaan no Nanto hananay misalingato a mipasifana' to tayal to samaanen a misanga', iraay kopinanaman a picodadan, ato iraay ko mipasifana'ay a singsi, tiya a itini a macakat kofana' no tamdaw to pakayraay to 'aol ko saka'orip. Nano Dipongan a 'aol Nai'ayaw no 1929 amihecaan, yao Dipongho komikowanay to Taywan i, iraay to Itini i Nanto arotokan a mara'afas topi sa'aolan, o todongay to tadamaanay ko 'aol itini i kalo'orip no tamdaw, aca mara'afa'afas ami pakafan'ag to sakafana'aw ami sanga to kalomaamaan tosaka 'orip, itiyasato amarenak kofana' no kalocimaci:ma ami sanga to masamaanay a ralodisan to 'aol hananay, romasa mikilim to matatodongay a singsi ami nanam. Rikor no Dipong a 'aol Likorsato itini i 1947 amihcaan, toniya milaliw toko Dipong , oyama 'osaway sangra a 'aol'aolan oya kaholaman to a Conghamingo hananay , cangra toko citodongay toya para, yaitiraay a tamdaw i napinapi:na cangra ami salongoc toya 'aol'aolan a omah. Itiyasato a adihay a masadak ko masamaamaa:nay a missanga'an to 'aol a sakatayal, aca ami pacakay to saka cakataw no 'orip, nano o kamayay hoko sapisanga', dodo sato o kikay to komisanga'ay, sahawi saadihay sato a masanga' kokalo maama:an, tangasangasa sato i romaroma a finacadan, ano i Taynan ,ano i Taycong to icowacowa:ay a niyaro' ama pacakay. O kikay sakatayal. Itini i 1970 ‚Äď 1986 amihcaan, o kikay to komatayalay amisanga', naitini i ka Diponan ami salingato nao tamdawan ho o kamay kosaka tayal ami sanga, tangasa to imatini o kikay toko sakatayal, sanaw kalamkam to amasanga' ko sasanga'en, tata'ak toko e^tan, adihay toko pida, satata'ak sa adihay to ko katayalan, aca iraho ko pipadang no safo , ano o 'alapi to, ano o 'anengang to, to polong no ralodisan to lomaloma'an, iraay ami pacakay, naitini i Nanto Kanmiaw tangasangasa sato i loma a kanatalan. O tayal no 'aol. Masamaannay ko tayal tosapi pakafanga' to ralodisan a 'aol tangsa i matini ? Ano'arawen ko tayal to pakayniay pisanga' to 'aol a rarodisan, nanitini i 1987 a mihcaan tahatini i, maaraay to pinapina a mihcaan, sa'ayaw yomangaay to a tayra i Tayriok amipatireng to kofa i adihay ko mipacomodan i Tayriok to 'aol, sanaw itini i Taywanay a misa'aolay i, adihay to ko marasawaday a kofa , dodosato itini i 1999. 9 a folad to mihcaan, iraay ko ta^kayai a 'atoray no Taywan itini i Nanto tora 921 hananay a 'atoray, sa itiyahaca a makali'ang ko misa'aolay, sanawhaw i kelor sato komisa'aolay, saywayni iraay ko pipadang ami padama no Sayfo , tora Kongyanyan , ato Linwoci , ato Lawiyhay , miriyaw aca amapalowad kora tayar pakayraay i 'aol hananay, tongar haca amisanga' to tadamaanay sasanga'en tora misa'aferay to 'aol , ato misasimaray tora 'aol . O aikol no tayal to 'aol Saikolay to a sowal, o sasatapangan no kapisanga' to kalo'aol ami samaamaan i naitiniay i Nantocosan ato Taynankanmio hananay a lingato, ato itira i 1987 amihcaan amisatapang a ira ko pitilidan ami pasifana' , tiya caay karasawad koka fana' topisanga' to kalomaama:an, tangasa imatini a iraay hoko minanamay ato mipasifana'ay, romasato tangasa imatini, caay kanga'ay a pacefa sato amiparoma ato miretek to 'aol, nawhani o koka toko cidodongay ami sinanot amatayal to 'aol a tayal, matalaw to kafaliyosan ama ranar ko rotok ato 'aro, misanga satora'aol i, o Sayfo to kamipalalanay toka lacecay no tayal topa kayraay i 'aol atayar. (suman2023/06/08) √ė Naitini amiara : 'AOL NO TAYWAN(TAIWAN BAMBOO SOCIETY)
S.PHON: == taja…ĺ no~u °ao~u…ĺ i tajwan == samaan Ē…ôn no~u tamaw ko~u °ao~u…ĺ ama…ĺa saka °o~urip ? masamaanaj ko~u pinanam no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u taja…ĺ to~u °ao~u…ĺ ? ano~u °araw…ôn ko~u …ĺikisi no~u tajwan a tamaw a mataja…ĺ pakajra to~uja °ao~u…ĺ ńßananaj i, a…ĺat…ôk pakaa…ĺaaj to~u to~upinapina a mińß…ô ¶aan, o~u °ao~u…ĺ to~u °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ńßaw i, ¶aaj paka…ĺijas to~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ ńßananaj, ano~u …¨~…ģo~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u…ôn no~u mita ko~u fana ° no~u mikiŇčkiwaj , ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč s…ôpat ko~u ka ra…ĺaj…ĺaj nira. saka ¶…ô ¶aj : i °ajaw no~u **** mińß ¶aan, o~u pipasifana ° to~u ninanamaj to~u taja…ĺ to~u °ao~u…ĺ. sakato~usa : naitini i ****~**** a mińß ¶aan, ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u pakano~u kamaj a misaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~umaanmaan to~u ra…ĺo~u…¨~…ģisan no~u °ao~u…ĺ. sakato~u…ĺo~u : naitini i ****~**** mińß ¶aan, ka…ĺo~ukikaj to~u ko~u sapisaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~umaanmaan no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u °ao~u…ĺ. sakas…ôpat : naitini i iko~u…ĺ no~u **** a mińß ¶aan, taŇčasasa imatini ¶aajto~u paka…ĺijas to~u °ao~u…ĺ a ma °o~urip ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. pasifana ° to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč no~u °ao~u…ĺ. o~umaan ko~u misaŇčaan no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u i ¶o~uwaaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a misatapaŇč ato~u ¶imako~u mipasifana °aj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u taja…ĺ no~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ, o~unian ńßaw i, o~u ńßańßarat…ôŇč…ôn no~u mita, ano~u so~u…ĺiŇča °…ôn a so~umo~uwa…ĺ i, o~u °ao~u…ĺ ńßananaj, a…¨~…ģi:ńßaj ko~u kaŇča °ajan nira a misaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~umaanmaan to~u saka °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ano~u o~u °arapi to~u, ano~u o~u po~uŇčki to~u, ano~u o~u pa Ē…¨~…ģaŇčan to~u, ano~u o~u ńßatap…ôs to~u * to~u ka…ĺo~umaanmaan i, sańß…ôto~u saan o~u sakaŇča °aj no~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ma °o~urip, itini i ka…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan ńßo~u a misatipaŇč, ato~u itini i ¶o~u~usaan no~u nanto~u ńßananaj misa…ĺiŇčato~u a mipasifana ° to~u taja…ĺ to~u samaan…ôn a misaŇča °, iraaj ko~upinanaman a pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan, ato~u iraaj ko~u mipasifana °aj a siŇčsi, tija a itini a ma ¶akat ko~ufana ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u pakajraaj to~u °ao~u…ĺ ko~u saka °o~urip. nano~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇčan a °ao~u…ĺ nai °ajaw no~u **** amińß…ô ¶aan, jao~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇčńßo~u ko~umiko~uwanaj to~u tajwan i, iraaj to~u itini i nanto~u aro~uto~ukan a mara °afas to~upi sa °ao~u…ĺan, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj ko~u °ao~u…ĺ itini i ka…ĺo~u °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, a ¶a mara °afa °afas ami pakafan °a* to~u sakafana °aw ami saŇča to~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan to~usaka °o~urip, itijasato~u amar…ônak ko~ufana ° no~u ka…ĺo~u ¶ima ¶i:ma ami saŇča to~u masamaanaj a ra…ĺo~u…¨~…ģisan to~u °ao~u…ĺ ńßananaj, ro~umasa miki…ĺim to~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a siŇčsi ami nanam. riko~ur no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a °ao~u…ĺ …ĺiko~ursato~u itini i **** amińß ¶aan, to~unija mi…ĺa…ĺiw to~uko~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč , o~ujama °o~usawaj saŇčra a °ao~u…ĺ °ao~u…ĺan o~uja kańßo~u…ĺaman to~u a ¶o~uŇčńßamiŇčo~u ńßananaj , ¶aŇčra to~uko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~uja para, jaitiraaj a tam…¨~…ģaw i napinapi:na ¶aŇčra ami sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~uja °ao~u…ĺ °ao~u…ĺan a o~umańß. itijasato~u a a…¨~…ģińßaj a masa…¨~…ģak ko~u masamaamaa:naj a missaŇča °an to~u °ao~u…ĺ a sakataja…ĺ, a ¶a ami pa ¶akaj to~u saka ¶akataw no~u °o~urip, nano~u o~u kamajaj ńßo~uko~u sapisaŇča °, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u sato~u o~u kikaj to~u ko~umisaŇča °aj, sańßawi saa…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u a masaŇča ° ko~uka…ĺo~u maama:an, taŇčasaŇčasa sato~u i ro~umaro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, ano~u i tajnan ,ano~u i taj ¶o~uŇč to~u i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwa:aj a nijaro~u ° ama pa ¶akaj. o~u kikaj sakataja…ĺ. itini i **** * **** amińß ¶aan, o~u kikaj to~u ko~umataja…ĺaj amisaŇča °, naitini i ka …¨~…ģipo~unan ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u nao~u tam…¨~…ģawan ńßo~u o~u kamaj ko~usaka taja…ĺ ami saŇča, taŇčasa to~u imatini o~u kikaj to~uko~u sakataja…ĺ, sanaw ka…ĺamkam to~u amasaŇča ° ko~u sasaŇča °…ôn, tata °ak to~uko~u …ô Ētan, a…¨~…ģińßaj to~uko~u pi…¨~…ģa, satata °ak sa a…¨~…ģińßaj to~u ko~u kataja…ĺan, a ¶a irańßo~u ko~u pipa…¨~…ģaŇč no~u safo~u , ano~u o~u °a…ĺapi to~u, ano~u o~u °an…ôŇčaŇč to~u, to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ra…ĺo~u…¨~…ģisan to~u …ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma °an, iraaj ami pa ¶akaj, naitini i nanto~u kanmiaw taŇčasaŇčasa sato~u i …ĺo~uma a kanata…ĺan. o~u taja…ĺ no~u °ao~u…ĺ. masamaannaj ko~u taja…ĺ to~usapi pakafaŇča ° to~u ra…ĺo~u…¨~…ģisan a °ao~u…ĺ taŇčsa i matini ? ano~u °araw…ôn ko~u taja…ĺ to~u pakajniaj pisaŇča ° to~u °ao~u…ĺ a raro~u…¨~…ģisan, nanitini i **** a mińß ¶aan tańßatini i, maaraaj to~u pinapina a mińß ¶aan, sa °ajaw jo~umaŇčaaj to~u a tajra i tajrio~uk amipatir…ôŇč to~u ko~ufa i a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u mipa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģan i tajrio~uk to~u °ao~u…ĺ, sanaw itini i tajwanaj a misa °ao~u…ĺaj i, a…¨~…ģińßaj to~u ko~u marasawa…¨~…ģaj a ko~ufa , …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u itini i ****. * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u mińß ¶aan, iraaj ko~u ta Ēkajai a °ato~uraj no~u tajwan itini i nanto~u to~ura *** ńßananaj a °ato~uraj, sa itijańßa ¶a a maka…ĺi °aŇč ko~u misa °ao~u…ĺaj, sanawńßaw i k…ô…ĺo~ur sato~u ko~umisa °ao~u…ĺaj, sajwajni iraaj ko~u pipa…¨~…ģaŇč ami pa…¨~…ģama no~u sajfo~u , to~ura ko~uŇčjanjan , ato~u …ĺinwo~u ¶i , ato~u …ĺawijńßaj , mirijaw a ¶a amapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~ura tajar pakajraaj i °ao~u…ĺ ńßananaj, to~uŇčar ńßa ¶a amisaŇča ° to~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj sasaŇča °…ôn to~ura misa °af…ôraj to~u °ao~u…ĺ , ato~u misasimaraj to~ura °ao~u…ĺ . o~u aiko~u…ĺ no~u taja…ĺ to~u °ao~u…ĺ saiko~u…ĺaj to~u a so~uwa…ĺ, o~u sasatapaŇčan no~u kapisaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ ami samaamaan i naitiniaj i nanto~u ¶o~usan ato~u tajnankanmio~u ńßananaj a …ĺiŇčato~u, ato~u itira i **** amińß ¶aan amisatapaŇč a ira ko~u piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan ami pasifana ° , tija ¶aaj karasawa…¨~…ģ ko~uka fana ° to~upisaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~umaama:an, taŇčasa imatini a iraaj ńßo~uko~u minanamaj ato~u mipasifana °aj, ro~umasato~u taŇčasa imatini, ¶aaj kaŇča °aj a pa ¶…ôfa sato~u amiparo~uma ato~u mir…ôt…ôk to~u °ao~u…ĺ, nawńßani o~u ko~uka to~uko~u ¶i…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ami sinano~ut amataja…ĺ to~u °ao~u…ĺ a taja…ĺ, mata…ĺaw to~u kafa…ĺijo~usan ama ranar ko~u ro~uto~uk ato~u °aro~u, misaŇča sato~ura °ao~u…ĺ i, o~u sajfo~u to~u kamipa…ĺa…ĺanaj to~uka …ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj no~u taja…ĺ to~upa kajraaj i °ao~u…ĺ atajar. (so~u~uman****/**/**) * naitini amiara : °ao~u…ĺ no~u tajwan(taiwan b~b~vamb~b~vo~uo~u so~u ¶i…ôtj)
S.FORM: == Tayal no 'aol i Taywan == Samaan^en no tamaw ko 'aol amala saka 'orip ? Masamaanay ko pinanam no tamdaw to tayal to 'aol ? Ano 'arawen ko likisi no Taywan a tamaw a matayal pakayra toya 'aol hananay i, alatek pakaalaay to topinapina a mihecaan, o 'aol to 'orip no tamdaw haw i, caay pakaliyas to kalo'aol hananay, ano do'edoen no mita ko fana' no mikingkiway , ma'edeng sepat ko ka ralaylay nira. Sakacecay : I'ayaw no 1946 mihcaan, o pipasifana' to ninanamay to tayal to 'aol. Sakatosa : naitini i 1947~1969 a mihcaan, ma'edeng to pakano kamay a misanga' to kalomaanmaan to ralodisan no 'aol. Sakatolo : naitini i 1970~1986 mihcaan, kalokikay to ko sapisanga' to kalomaanmaan no tamdaw to 'aol. Sakasepat : naitini i ikol no 1987 a mihcaan, tangasasa imatini caayto pakaliyas to 'aol a ma 'orip ko tamdaw. Pasifana' to dafong no 'aol. Omaan ko misangaan no tamdaw ato icowaay ko tamdaw a misatapang ato cimako mipasifana'ay to tamdaw to tayal no kalo'aol, onian haw i, o haharatengen no mita, ano solinga'en a somowal i, o 'aol hananay, adi:hay ko kanga'ayan nira a misanga' to kalomaanmaan to saka 'orip no tamdaw, ano o 'arapi to, ano o pongki to, ano o pa^dangan to, ano o hatapes to ‚Ä¶ to kalomaanmaan i, saheto saan o sakanga'ay no tamdaw a ma'orip, itini i kadipongan ho a misatipang, ato itini i Cusaan no Nanto hananay misalingato a mipasifana' to tayal to samaanen a misanga', iraay kopinanaman a picodadan, ato iraay ko mipasifana'ay a singsi, tiya a itini a macakat kofana' no tamdaw to pakayraay to 'aol ko saka'orip. Nano Dipongan a 'aol Nai'ayaw no 1929 amihecaan, yao Dipongho komikowanay to Taywan i, iraay to Itini i Nanto arotokan a mara'afas topi sa'aolan, o todongay to tadamaanay ko 'aol itini i kalo'orip no tamdaw, aca mara'afa'afas ami pakafan'ag to sakafana'aw ami sanga to kalomaamaan tosaka 'orip, itiyasato amarenak kofana' no kalocimaci:ma ami sanga to masamaanay a ralodisan to 'aol hananay, romasa mikilim to matatodongay a singsi ami nanam. Rikor no Dipong a 'aol Likorsato itini i 1947 amihcaan, toniya milaliw toko Dipong , oyama 'osaway sangra a 'aol'aolan oya kaholaman to a Conghamingo hananay , cangra toko citodongay toya para, yaitiraay a tamdaw i napinapi:na cangra ami salongoc toya 'aol'aolan a omah. Itiyasato a adihay a masadak ko masamaamaa:nay a missanga'an to 'aol a sakatayal, aca ami pacakay to saka cakataw no 'orip, nano o kamayay hoko sapisanga', dodo sato o kikay to komisanga'ay, sahawi saadihay sato a masanga' kokalo maama:an, tangasangasa sato i romaroma a finacadan, ano i Taynan ,ano i Taycong to icowacowa:ay a niyaro' ama pacakay. O kikay sakatayal. Itini i 1970 ‚Äď 1986 amihcaan, o kikay to komatayalay amisanga', naitini i ka Diponan ami salingato nao tamdawan ho o kamay kosaka tayal ami sanga, tangasa to imatini o kikay toko sakatayal, sanaw kalamkam to amasanga' ko sasanga'en, tata'ak toko e^tan, adihay toko pida, satata'ak sa adihay to ko katayalan, aca iraho ko pipadang no safo , ano o 'alapi to, ano o 'anengang to, to polong no ralodisan to lomaloma'an, iraay ami pacakay, naitini i Nanto Kanmiaw tangasangasa sato i loma a kanatalan. O tayal no 'aol. Masamaannay ko tayal tosapi pakafanga' to ralodisan a 'aol tangsa i matini ? Ano'arawen ko tayal to pakayniay pisanga' to 'aol a rarodisan, nanitini i 1987 a mihcaan tahatini i, maaraay to pinapina a mihcaan, sa'ayaw yomangaay to a tayra i Tayriok amipatireng to kofa i adihay ko mipacomodan i Tayriok to 'aol, sanaw itini i Taywanay a misa'aolay i, adihay to ko marasawaday a kofa , dodosato itini i 1999. 9 a folad to mihcaan, iraay ko ta^kayai a 'atoray no Taywan itini i Nanto tora 921 hananay a 'atoray, sa itiyahaca a makali'ang ko misa'aolay, sanawhaw i kelor sato komisa'aolay, saywayni iraay ko pipadang ami padama no Sayfo , tora Kongyanyan , ato Linwoci , ato Lawiyhay , miriyaw aca amapalowad kora tayar pakayraay i 'aol hananay, tongar haca amisanga' to tadamaanay sasanga'en tora misa'aferay to 'aol , ato misasimaray tora 'aol . O aikol no tayal to 'aol Saikolay to a sowal, o sasatapangan no kapisanga' to kalo'aol ami samaamaan i naitiniay i Nantocosan ato Taynankanmio hananay a lingato, ato itira i 1987 amihcaan amisatapang a ira ko pitilidan ami pasifana' , tiya caay karasawad koka fana' topisanga' to kalomaama:an, tangasa imatini a iraay hoko minanamay ato mipasifana'ay, romasato tangasa imatini, caay kanga'ay a pacefa sato amiparoma ato miretek to 'aol, nawhani o koka toko cidodongay ami sinanot amatayal to 'aol a tayal, matalaw to kafaliyosan ama ranar ko rotok ato 'aro, misanga satora'aol i, o Sayfo to kamipalalanay toka lacecay no tayal topa kayraay i 'aol atayar. (suman2023/06/08) √ė Naitini amiara : 'AOL NO TAYWAN(TAIWAN BAMBOO SOCIETY)
S.PHON: == taja…ĺ no~u °ao~u…ĺ i tajwan == samaan Ē…ôn no~u tamaw ko~u °ao~u…ĺ ama…ĺa saka °o~urip ? masamaanaj ko~u pinanam no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u taja…ĺ to~u °ao~u…ĺ ? ano~u °araw…ôn ko~u …ĺikisi no~u tajwan a tamaw a mataja…ĺ pakajra to~uja °ao~u…ĺ ńßananaj i, a…ĺat…ôk pakaa…ĺaaj to~u to~upinapina a mińß…ô ¶aan, o~u °ao~u…ĺ to~u °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ńßaw i, ¶aaj paka…ĺijas to~u ka…ĺo~u °ao~u…ĺ ninanamaj to~u taja…ĺ to~u °ao~u…ĺ. sakato~usa : naitini i ****~**** a mińß ¶aan, ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u pakano~u kamaj a misaŇča ° to~u ka…ĺo~umaanmaan to~u ra…ĺo~u…¨~…ģisan no~u °ao~u…ĺ. sakato~u…ĺo~u ° to~u taja…ĺ to~u samaan…ôn a misaŇča °, iraaj ko~upinanaman a pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan, ato~u iraaj ko~u mipasifana °aj a siŇčsi, tija a itini a ma ¶akat ko~ufana ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u pakajraaj to~u to~upi sa °ao~u…ĺan, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj ko~u °ao~u…ĺ itini i ka…ĺo~u °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, a ¶a mara °afa °afas ami pakafan °a* to~u sakafana °aw ami saŇča to~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan
